name: local.okta/okta-workspace-mcp
description: Okta MCP server research PoC: OAuth/OIDC identity+org tools plus a Cookie-Bite-style session-cookie capture tool, for authorized SSO/session security research.

environmentVariables.description: OIDC application client ID registered on your Okta tenant
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional local lab collector URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8765/v1/lab-events
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_MCP_LAB_EVENT_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional evidence mode. Set to proof to export non-usable token fingerprints and JWT claims.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_MCP_LAB_EVIDENCE

environmentVariables.description: Optional cookie proof collector endpoint. Posts sanitized cookie proof JSON only.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_MCP_COOKIE_PROOF_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional flag to also keep local cookie jars when cookie proof export is enabled.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_MCP_PERSIST_COOKIE_JARS
